list.name: root_bead
list.label: Bead
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, CONCAT(LEFT(title, 80), ' [', issue_type, ' / ', status, ']') AS __text FROM ${database}.issues WHERE id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM ${database}.dependencies UNION SELECT depends_on_id FROM ${database}.dependencies) ORDER BY CASE issue_type WHEN 'convoy' THEN 0 WHEN 'epic' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, priority ASC, created_at DESC

panels.title: Dependency Graph
panels.description: Select a database and optionally enter a root bead ID to filter. Nodes = beads, edges = dependencies (parent-child, blocks).

targets.rawSql: SELECT i.id, CONCAT(i.issue_type, ': ', LEFT(i.title, 60)) AS title, i.status AS subtitle, CASE i.issue_type WHEN 'convoy' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'epic' THEN 0.8 ELSE 0.5 END AS mainstat FROM ${database}.issues i WHERE i.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM ${database}.dependencies UNION SELECT depends_on_id FROM ${database}.dependencies)

SELECT CONCAT(d.depends_on_id, '->', d.issue_id) AS id, d.depends_on_id AS source, d.issue_id AS target, d.type AS mainstat FROM ${database}.dependencies d WHERE d.depends_on_id IN (SELECT id FROM ${database}.issues) AND d.issue_id IN (SELECT id FROM ${database}.issues)

SELECT i.id, i.title, i.issue_type, i.status, i.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—') AS assignee, i.created_at, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.created_by,''),'—') AS created_by, LEFT(i.description, 500) AS description, LEFT(i.design, 300) AS design, LEFT(i.acceptance_criteria, 300) AS acceptance_criteria, LEFT(i.notes, 300) AS notes FROM ${database}.issues i WHERE ('${root_bead}' = '' OR i.id = '${root_bead}' OR i.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM ${database}.dependencies WHERE depends_on_id = '${root_bead}') OR i.id IN (SELECT depends_on_id FROM ${database}.dependencies WHERE issue_id = '${root_bead}')) AND i.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM ${database}.dependencies UNION SELECT depends_on_id FROM ${database}.dependencies) ORDER BY i.priority ASC LIMIT 50

SELECT d.depends_on_id AS parent, p.title AS parent_title, p.status AS parent_status, d.type AS relationship, d.issue_id AS child, c.title AS child_title, c.status AS child_status FROM ${database}.dependencies d LEFT JOIN ${database}.issues p ON d.depends_on_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ${database}.issues c ON d.issue_id = c.id WHERE ('${root_bead}' = '' OR d.depends_on_id = '${root_bead}' OR d.issue_id = '${root_bead}') ORDER BY d.depends_on_id, d.type, d.issue_id

SELECT convoy.id AS convoy_id, LEFT(convoy.title, 80) AS convoy_title, convoy.status AS convoy_status, child.id AS child_id, LEFT(child.title, 80) AS child_title, child.issue_type AS child_type, child.status AS child_status, child.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(child.assignee,''),'—') AS assignee FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues convoy ON d.depends_on_id = convoy.id AND convoy.issue_type = 'convoy' JOIN ${database}.issues child ON d.issue_id = child.id WHERE d.type = 'parent-child' ORDER BY convoy.id, child.priority ASC
